item.title: Married At First Sight UK bride Shona Manderson speaks out after non-consensual sex act allegations
item.description: Shona Manderson has revealed she is facing ‘blame and judgement’ after speaking publicly.

item.title: Health Star Rating: Warning as Australia moves to mandate food labels on packaged products
item.description: Companies have been able to ‘game’ the system for more than a decade.

item.title: Host of children’s YouTube channel Danny Go! announces son’s death after years-long health battle
item.description: ‘Oh my sweet boy.’

item.title: How a special tattoo service is helping breast cancer survivors feel ‘complete’ again
item.description: ‘It hit something in me and I thought, ‘I can do that’.’

item.title: Veteran jockey Shane McGovern dies after horrible accident aged 67
item.description: The 67-year-old has sadly died after suffering horrendous injuries in a freak accident.

item.title: Stunning UFO footage released as Pentagon unseals second batch of classified files
item.description: One aerial encounter left an intelligence officer ‘virtually speechless’.

item.title: ‘Our hearts are broken’: Family’s touching move after son killed in NSW farm accident
item.description: ‘We are now learning how to live with something no parent or sibling ever expects.’

item.title: US report reveals whether child deaths definitively linked to COVID shots
item.description: The Food and Drug Administration’s report was quietly made public last week.

item.title: New details emerge on NASCAR champion Kyle Busch’s sudden death
item.description: The 41-year-old was testing in a racing simulator when he suddenly became unresponsive.

item.title: Toyota Supercars teams double up as Chaz Mostert and Andre Heimgartner win Saturday races from pole
item.description: Walkinshaw and Brad Jones Racing both shed growing pains to claim victories from pole.

item.title: The Issue: Anthony Albanese may attend FIFA World Cup and meet with US President Donald Trump
item.description: ‘We’ll be backing the Socceroos when it comes to the World Cup.’

item.title: Chris Waller hits rare double-century of G1s after Doomben Cup win
item.description: ‘He deserves all the accolades he gets.’

item.title: It Takes Two rapper Rob Base, who helped take hip-hop mainstream, dies at 59
item.description: The rapper, whose real name was Robert Ginyard, was best known for the 1988 chart-topper It Takes Two.

item.title: Gang kingpin Lorenzo Lamalu murdered in Vietnam leaving Sydney underworld on edge
item.description: Police are hunting two Australian men believed to be linked to the deadly shooting.

item.title: Auckland FC break through to win maiden A-League title with 1-0 win over Sydney FC
item.description: New Zealand’s newest side has won the country’s maiden A-League championship.

item.title: Ukrainian attack triggers fire at oil terminal in Russia’s Krasnodar region
item.description: Kyiv continues to target the energy facilities that help fund Moscow's four-year-old war.

item.title: Uganda confirms new Ebola cases as tracing steps up
item.description: The WHO warns the risk of an epidemic is ‘very high’ in neighbouring Congo, where the outbreak began.

item.title: US President Trump says agreement with Iran has ‘been largely negotiated’ and Strait of Hormuz will be opened
item.description: He said the peace deal with Iran is now ‘subject to finalisation’.

item.title: Family of Kyle Busch reveals two-time NASCAR champion’s cause of death
item.description: The 41-year-old was struck down by a severe condition that quickly progressed into something lethal.

item.title: Ebola clinic tent by Doctors Without Borders set ablaze in Congo with 18 leaving amid virus outbreak
item.description: Angry residents set fire to the tent, causing 18 people suspected of the infection to leave.

item.title: Riley McGree’s World Cup hopes in danger after limping off in Championship playoff final
item.description: One of Australia’s most creative and explosive players is in a race against time.

item.title: Localised Optus outage hits SA town for several hours
item.description: Police say an equipment fault is behind the latest disruption, with Optus technicians fixing it about 12pm.

item.title: Virgin River star Stewart McLean found dead after going missing, friend reveals warning sign before his death
item.description: An actor has been found dead days after he went missing, with police suspecting the star was murdered.

item.title: Paul Simon bemoans Elvis Presley 'wasting his great talent'
item.description: 'Really, by ‘57, I’d lost interest in Elvis Presley.’

item.title: ‘Unnecessary tragedy’: Bob Katter blasts shark laws after fatal Far North Queensland attack
item.description: Bob Katter says rising numbers are ‘out of control’ following the death of a 39-year-old man.

item.title: 7NEWS Spotlight: Olympian Libby Trickett sounds alarm after near death experience
item.description: ‘The amount of families destroyed because a woman has this catastrophic event is more than I can bear.’

item.title: Russia uses hypersonic Oreshnik missile in mass attack on Ukrainian capital Kyiv
item.description: Vladimir Putin says several such missiles, even with conventional warheads, could be as devastating as a nuclear strike.

item.title: Former Game of Thrones star Hannah Murray recalls being drawn into a wellness cult
item.description: ‘I made terrible choices.’

item.title: China sending astronaut on year-long space mission
item.description: The race to return a human to the moon is heating up as pressure mounts on China to meet its 2030 deadline.

item.title: ‘Battered and bruised’: Aussie flotilla activists return home after Israeli detention
item.description: ‘I am physically hurting a bit but also have a strong resolve.’

item.title: Oscar Piastri fumes over team radio after risky strategy backfires as Kimi Antonelli wins Canadian Grand Prix
item.description: ‘Major, major disappointment and there will be a very big debrief at McLaren after this.’

item.title: Dezi Freeman: Coronial inquests into deaths of fugitive and two slain Victorian police officers to begin
item.description: Speculation has been rife over how Freeman eluded capture for seven months.

item.title: Formula One legend Alain Prost becomes victim of violent home attack
item.description: The 71-year-old has suffered a head injury after coming face to face with intruders in his home.

item.title: Peter V’landys becomes interim NRL chief executive after Andrew Abdo quits to join Tennis Australia
item.description: Rugby league’s supremo has made an immediate move amid the ‘devastation’ of his right-hand man’s departure.

item.title: Devil Wears Prada star Anne Hathaway reveals her trick for a non-surgical ‘facelift’
item.description: ‘I wanted to show that I didn’t make a huge medical decision.’

item.title: Caleb Shomo: Married member of American metal band Beartooth comes out as ‘proudly gay man’
item.description: The revelation has divided fans, as the band announces major news of its own.

item.title: US comedian Laura Clery reveals ‘terrifying’ accident after being pinned under 270kg fridge
item.description: ‘I could feel it getting harder to inhale, like my body was deciding to shut down.’

item.title: Red Cross volunteers among ‘first known victims’ of deadly outbreak of Ebola as number of cases rises in Uganda
item.description: Health authorities are scrambling to contain the outbreak.

item.title: Teal independents mull forming new political party as Coalition loses votes to One Nation
item.description: ‘There’s huge frustration and unhappiness with the major parties.’

item.title: James Magnussen finishes last in 100m freestyle at inaugural Enhanced Games
item.description: The Australian Olympian is still cashing in despite trailing the winner by almost three seconds.

item.title: Aussie model Bianca Censori spotted without pants in public alongside husband Kanye West
item.description: The controversial model and architect has made yet another bold fashion statement.

item.title: Australian hero Neale Daniher dies aged 65 after brave 13-year battle with MND
item.description: The AFL icon’s inspiring life is sadly over, but he never gave up the fight.

item.title: Anna Robards talks about daughter Elle’s hair-pulling habit: ‘Traumatising’
item.description: ‘I was seriously lost.’

item.title: Adelaide café owner and locals left upset after dogs banned over complaint
item.description: The Adelaide cafe owner was given a warning and risks big fines if she allows dogs back inside.

item.title: Do It For Dolly Day inches toward $2 million goal as fight continues to end bullying
item.description: ‘The love Australians have shown for Dolly and for our cause never ceases to move us.’

item.title: Mitchell Moses in doubt for State of Origin as Matt Burton rushed into NSW camp
item.description: The Blues look set to be forced to blood a debutant in the No.7 jumper.

item.title: Gerard Baden-Clay facing another decade in prison for murder of wife Allison under new parole laws
item.description: A landmark change in Queensland could block the infamous murderer from applying for parole next year.

item.title: Rough sleepers, ex‑prisoners living in Adelaide park Edinburgh Reserve ordered to leave
item.description: Council has now issued the group of men living in the Adelaide park an ultimatum.

item.title: AFL bombshell as Collingwood potentially robbed of win over Hawthorn due to interchange blunder
item.description: ‘They should protest, because it’s so obvious. The evidence is there that the result should be their win.’

item.title: Neale Daniher’s closest mates Bill Guest and Chris Fagan share agonising last conversations
item.description: The icon still had his humour but ‘I knew when we left we’d never see Neale again - it was very sad’.

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Lionel Messi joins list of injury concerns ahead of kick-off in US, Canada and Mexico
item.description: The tournament begins in just three weeks.

item.title: Russia warns foreigners to evacuate Kyiv as it threatens onslaught on Ukraine’s capital
item.description: Moscow claims the strikes are in response to an attack on a student dorm in Russian-controlled Luhansk.

item.title: Brad Scott sacked as Essendon coach after nightmare 12 months
item.description: The Bombers have lost patience and cut ties despite 18 months left to run on his contract.

item.title: Donald Trump hinges Iran peace deal on Arab nations recognising Israel
item.description: The US president has warned of fresh attacks if current peace talks fail.

item.description: Multiple shows have been cancelled following the malfunction.

item.description: The Blues have been dealt a major curveball but they’ve already named their replacement.

item.description: The public assassination at a busy restaurant was caught on CCTV.

item.title: Rescuers race against time to reach seven people trapped in flooded Laos cave
item.description: Seven people who ventured into a cave to look for gold have been trapped for a week after flash flooding blocked their exit.

item.title: US unleashes barrage of new ‘self-defence strikes’ on Iran during tense peace talks
item.description: Tensions are intensifying between the two countries as both sides contest details in proposed peace agreements.

item.description: The stars have descended on Las Vegas as the annual ceremony kicks off at the iconic MGM Grand.

item.description: The new case involves a ‘close contact’ of a person connected to the initial outbreak, Spain’s Health Ministry said.

item.description: The staff member was shoved when a man was refused boarding on a connecting flight.

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: Footage emerges of chaotic alleged truck theft during whitegoods delivery in Perth’s south
item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: Iran labels new US strikes as ‘gross violation’ of ceasefire
item.description: ‘The clock cannot be turned back, and the nations and lands of the region will no longer be a shield for American bases.’

item.title: Ford Ranger Super Duty outselling Toyota LandCruiser 70 Series
item.description: The toughest Ford Ranger ever offered has found thousands of buyers since the Super Duty was released in late 2025.

item.title: Ford hits back at BYD and other Chinese brands
item.description: The Blue Oval brand says it’s not worried about Chinese auto brands, despite their rapid ascent up the sales charts in Australia.

item.title: Ford Bronco New Energy could be joined by other Chinese-made models in Australia
item.description: The extended-range Bronco electric SUV isn’t the only Ford model built in China and available for export.
